person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Hedwig of France (c. 970-after 1013), also called Avoise, Hadevide or Haltude, was Countess of Mons. She was the daughter of Hugh Capet, the first King of France, and his wife, Queen Adelaide of Aquitaine.

«b»Family«/b»
In 996 Hedwig married Rainier IV of Hainaut (947-1013). Their children were:

1.) Reginar V, Count of Mons

2.) Lambert

3.) Beatrix, who married Ebles I, Count of Rheims and Roucy

4.) Ermentrude, died at the age of two or three; buried in the Collegiate Church of Saint Gertrude in Nivelles, Belgium. The burial came to light during an excavation. A lead cross, inscribed with her name and that of her parents, was found in the tomb.

«b»Death«/b»
Following the death of her first husband, Hedwig remarried to Hugh de Dagsbourg. She died after 1013.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Hedwige de France於0970年出生在法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特奧爾萊安斯時，她的父親Hugues Capet roi des Francs30歲，母親Adélaïde d'Aquitaine Reine des Francs25歲。她於0986年與Régnier IV de Hainaut et de Mons結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1013年在比利時海瑙特享年43歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: France
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: ethnic name for someone from France (see 2 below).

French: habitational name given to someone from France (at the time when the name only applied to those lands belonging to the French king, covering only a small part of its current territory) or from Île-de-France (i.e. from a region centered on Paris); or, in southern France, an ethnic name for someone from what is now the northern half of the country, where the langue d'oïl (Old French as distinct from Occitan) was spoken. Compare   Defrance   and   Lafrance  .
Czech (Franče): from a pet form of František, Latin Franciscus (see Francis ).

variants.name: Defrance
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Henri, Jean-Paul.

French (mainly northern): habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, given to someone from France (at the time when the name only applied to those lands belonging to the French king, covering only a small part of its current territory) or from Île-de-France (i.e. from a region centered on Paris). Compare France .

nameMeanings.name: Hedwige
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Hedwige de France was born in 0970, in Orléans, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France, her father, Hugues Capet roi des Francs, was 30 and her mother, Adélaïde d'Aquitaine Reine des Francs, was 25. She married Régnier IV de Hainaut et de Mons in 0986. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1013, in Hainaut, Belgium, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hedwige de France est née en 0970, à Orléans, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France, son père, Hugues Capet roi des Francs, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Adélaïde d'Aquitaine Reine des Francs, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Régnier IV de Hainaut et de Mons en 0986. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1013, à Hainaut, Belgique, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.Orléans, Loiret, Centre, France: Orléans, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Hedwige de France 0970 in Orléans, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugues Capet roi des Francs 30 und ihre Mutter Adélaïde d'Aquitaine Reine des Francs 25. Sie hat 0986 Régnier IV de Hainaut et de Mons geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1013 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Hennegau, Belgien.

Lei sposato Régnier IV de Hainaut et de Mons nel 0986. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1013, nel Hainaut, Belgio, all'età di 43 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Hedwige de France(이)가 0970년 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 올를e아스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugues Capet roi des Francs(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adélaïde d'Aquitaine Reine des Francs(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 0986년 Régnier IV de Hainaut et de Mons(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1013년 벨기에 하인오트에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Régnier IV de Hainaut et de Mons em 0986. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1013, em Hainaut, Bélgica, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hedwige de France родилась в 0970 г. в местности орлeанс, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция, её отцу по имени Hugues Capet roi des Francs было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Adélaïde d'Aquitaine Reine des Francs, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Régnier IV de Hainaut et de Mons в 0986 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1013 г. в местности ханаут, Бельгия в возрасте 43 лет.
